Haywood would be released in a
day or two.


The Pinkerton retorted that ut
might be well to wait until they
had seen the ace in the hole"


1t was Immediately recalled that
there had been a most strange
friendship between Superintendent
Carey, of the Pinkertons, with head
quarters in Denver, and Pettibone,
and that they had been on the most
Intimate terms for a long period OF
years.


1t is now reported that Pettibone
has been paid by the detectives for
the long term he has spent in pris.
on awaiting the trial. but that at
the last minute he has collapsed
with fear, believing that if he goes
on the witness stand for the prose.
cution that he will be murdered by
friends of the men he was about to
betray. Fearing this as a certainty,
he prefers to save his life by keep.
ing silence.


Pettibone and others in a posi-
ton to know the inside workings
Of the miners federation have hot.
ly contradicted this story, which
they allege was started in the in
terests OF the prosecution.
